nws_forecast.name: This Afternoon
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain showers and areas of fog. Cloudy, with a high near 50. Southwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain showers and areas of fog before 7pm, then areas of fog and a chance of rain showers between 7pm and 9pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 37. West wind 9 to 16 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 47. West wind 14 to 17 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Rain Showers
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers after 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 33. West wind 6 to 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers before 8am, then rain likely. Partly sunny, with a high near 46. Northwest wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Light Snow then Mostly Clear
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 10pm, then a slight chance of snow between 10pm and 11pm. Mostly clear, with a low around 29. Northwest wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 46. West wind 5 to 12 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Clear, with a low around 33. South wind 7 to 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 53. South wind 7 to 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 40. South wind 8 to 12 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly sunny, with a high near 63. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night

nws_forecast.name: Saturday

nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain after 2pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 62. Northwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night

nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain before 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 42. North wind around 8 mph.
